commands.review_summary:
Adds a 265-line Superpowers design spec for an admin-only bulk latest-skill ClawScan rescan flow driven by `clawhub-mod` and backend batch/status endpoints.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a design spec rather than reporting a runtime bug. I verified current main lacks the described bulk command and batch/status routes by source inspection.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the next action is maintainer acceptance or requested edits to the design direction.

target.title: feat: add bulk skill rescan admin tool
target.body:
## Why

ClawHub had a one-skill ClawScan rescan command, but no operator-safe way to refresh the latest version of every active skill without queueing the whole corpus at once. This adds a paced admin flow that batches work, waits for each batch to drain, and leaves existing higher-priority scan jobs alone.

## What Changed

- Adds a low-priority `bulk-rescan` security scan source and admin-only Convex internals for enqueueing latest active skills in bounded batches.
- Exposes admin API endpoints at `POST /api/v1/skills/-/rescan-batch` and `POST /api/v1/skills/-/rescan-batch/status`.
- Adds `clawhub-mod skills rescan-all` with dry-run, cursor resume, max-skill cap, JSON events, human-readable progress, polling, and fail-fast support.
- Includes coverage for legacy active skills with missing `moderationStatus`, existing active job preservation, status aggregation, and the mod CLI pacing loop.

## Verification

- `bun run test -- convex/securityScan.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts packages/clawhub-mod/src/commands/moderation.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:packages`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
